title: LandUseRecommendation
description: A Brooklyn Borough President advisory recommendation on a Uniform Land Use Review Procedure (ULURP) application — the office's signature statutory power in the city land-use process. Canonical schema reconciling the 'Uniform Land Use Review Procedure (ULURP) Recommendations' dataset (4j6i-9rmr, 6 columns) and the /land-use and /uniform-land-use-review-procedure site sections. Keyed on ULURP Number(s).

ulurpNumbers.description: ULURP application number(s) ('ULURP Number(s)') — one record may carry several space-separated numbers (e.g. '210033 ZMK M 210034 LDK').

applicationName.description: ULURP application name / project ('ULURP Application Name').

recommendation.description: The Borough President's recommendation ('Borough President Recommendation').

communityBoards.description: Affected Brooklyn community board(s) ('Community Board(s)') — may be a list.

councilDistricts.description: Affected NYC Council district(s) ('Council District(s)') — may be a list.
